reason: Successfully sent a message to agent QA-20260507-201001-x95e and received a correct response mentioning "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully with sidebar showing all agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260507-201001-x95e" in the sidebar — Agent page opened and displayed
Verified agent status — Status indicator showed "idle" which satisfies the requirement ("running" or "idle")
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully entered in the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created
Waited for response — Agent responded almost immediately (within 1 second)
Verified response contains "4" and took screenshot — Response displayed as "4" which is the correct answer; screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the agent's response
